channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-18 16:52 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Another day, another $22B out the window.
item.description: Another day, another $22B out the window.

item.title: @elonmusk: We hit a 125 year low for murder in the United States last year. Data from before 1900 isn’t great s...
item.description: We hit a 125 year low for murder in the United States last year. Data from before 1900 isn’t great so it’s possible we hit the lowest murder rate in US history last year. Check out the graphic. Great news often gets limited attention. Thanks, President Trump. Graphic via@WSJ.

item.description: One day, we shall sail through the moon belts of Saturn 🪐

item.description: Download Grok and try it out

item.title: @elonmusk: MAXIMUM PENALTY FOR ILLEGAL ENTRY. 🇵🇰 Pakistan: 10 years jail + fine. 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia: 15 years impr...
item.description: MAXIMUM PENALTY FOR ILLEGAL ENTRY. 🇵🇰 Pakistan: 10 years jail + fine. 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia: 15 years imprisonment. 🇮🇷Iran: Up to 25 years prison. 🇦🇫 Afghanistan: Execution. 🇾🇪Yemen: Prison or death penalty. 🇸🇩Sudan: Prison 🇬🇧 Great Britain: free housing, health care, education, food, phone, cash. — ALL FUNDED BY THE TAX PAYER Over 65K illegals have arrived since July 2024. What happened to Britain??

item.title: @elonmusk: The UK continues its transition into something between a Gulag and a Caliphate.
item.description: The UK continues its transition into something between a Gulag and a Caliphate.

item.title: @elonmusk: OpenAI and ChatGPT are Woke. Google and Gemini are Woke. Grok and 𝕏 are not Woke. This alone is a go...
item.description: OpenAI and ChatGPT are Woke. Google and Gemini are Woke. Grok and 𝕏 are not Woke. This alone is a good reason to support 𝕏 in the AI Race.

item.title: @elonmusk: Berlin has just imposed INSANE immigration quotas on the judiciary system. Now 40% of candidates for...
item.description: Berlin has just imposed INSANE immigration quotas on the judiciary system. Now 40% of candidates for judges and prosecutors must have an immigrant origin. Is that so they can just let all the migrant criminals off easily without any repercussions at all? How the hell is this not a systematic version of racial replacement of Germans? Do the Germans ever plan on fighting back?

item.title: @elonmusk: Hollywood is over. It's all Internet now.
item.description: Hollywood is over. It's all Internet now.

item.description: What are your initial impressions of Grok 4.20? Major upgrades are still landing every week.
